pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 17 migration and Spring Boot 3 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as a baseline; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 17 may work but prevents access to Spring Boot 3 features and is not the target state of the migration recipe.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 17 to match the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces Java 17 as the minimum version; setting java.version to 11 would cause compilation failures or runtime incompatibilities with Spring Boot 3 APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add the flyway-mysql dependency to support MySQL-specific Flyway operations in newer versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: In newer Flyway versions, database-specific drivers are often separated into distinct artifacts; without this, Flyway may fail to initialize the MySQL connection properly at runtime.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the deprecated MySQL Connector/J artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'mysql:mysql-connector-java' is deprecated and removed in newer versions; the new artifact 'com.mysql:mysql-connector-j' is required for compatibility with modern JDBC drivers and Spring Boot 3.
